title: Algorithm Theoretical Basis Document
description: Document detailing the theoretical foundation of an algorithm, including physical theory, mathematical procedures, and assumptions, updated with algorithm changes.

definitions.definition: Document detailing the theoretical foundation of an algorithm, including physical theory, mathematical procedures, and assumptions, updated with algorithm changes.
